issues.description: DSL completely omits the core mechanics: (1) condition checking 'no other Black Maria Characters' is missing; (2) 'rest them' action after GiveDon is missing; (3) delayed end-of-turn effect that returns DON cards to match opponent's count is entirely absent; (4) GiveDon action should specify source as DON deck; (5) second action (return DON cards) requires separate effect with EndOfTurn trigger
Condition 'If you have no other [Black Maria] Characters' is not captured; requires custom condition logic or HasCardOnBoard negation
Missing 'Rest' action after GiveDon; missing entire second effect for end-of-turn return mechanic
